summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cricket Auction Management System MVP. Backend APIs working well (97.1% success rate), frontend functionality operational with minor UI issues.

minor_bugs.issue: Team deletion validation not working - allows deleting teams with players
minor_bugs.impact: Data integrity issue but not blocking main functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Error messages for validation (purse/base price) not displaying properly
Modal overlay sometimes blocks interactions after form submission

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: Configuration page - set teams, purse, slots and save
Team registration - add teams with names and logos
Player auction - add players with name, role, base price
Sell player - select team and enter sale price
Dashboard - view teams with stats and expand details
Export Excel button available and enabled
Backend API validation for duplicate teams
Backend API validation for invalid player roles
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix error message display in sell player dialog for validation scenarios (purse/base price errors). Fix modal overlay blocking interactions. Add proper aria-describedby attributes to dialog components.
